creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #5)
> This is available from Gnome's geographically distributed CDN.
Well done, Jason. Good find!

> Can you revise this to use that as the main source?
> 
> https://download.gnome.org/teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon/
Absolutely. I'll post the revised version reflecting this now.

Thanks, Jason!

--Chris
